name: messaging-e2e-test
description: E2E test project to verify all messaging agents activate correctly

requirements.title: Real-time WebSocket Chat
requirements.description: Implement WebSocket-based real-time messaging with Socket.io for instant message delivery between users. Support private and group chat rooms.

requirements.title: Redis Pub/Sub Integration
requirements.description: Configure Redis adapter for WebSocket scaling across multiple server instances. Implement pub/sub channels for real-time event broadcasting.

requirements.title: User Presence Tracking
requirements.description: Track online/offline status with heartbeat mechanism. Implement typing indicators with 5-second TTL auto-expiry. Store last seen timestamps in Redis.

requirements.title: Read Receipt System
requirements.description: Implement message delivery states: SENT, DELIVERED, READ. Track delivery and read timestamps. Batch delivery receipts for efficiency.

requirements.title: End-to-End Encryption
requirements.description: Implement E2EE using ECDH key exchange protocol. Encrypt message content with AES-256. Support per-device key management and secure key storage.

requirements.title: JWT Authentication
requirements.description: Implement JWT-based authentication with access and refresh tokens. Secure WebSocket connections with token validation.

requirements.title: User Management API
requirements.description: CRUD endpoints for user accounts: GET /api/users, POST /api/users, PUT /api/users/:id. Include user profile and contact list management.

requirements.title: Message Storage
requirements.description: Store messages in PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM. Support message pagination, search, and filtering by conversation.
